commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Does not wisdom cry. and understanding put forth her voice. Men are wanting to themselves: they cannot plead ignorance. (Calmet) Wisdom stands on high in the Catholic Church inviting all to virtue and happiness. (Worthington) Some explain this of the light which is communicated to men; but the Fathers apply it to Jesus Christ, some of the expressions regarding his divine, and others his human nature, Ecclesiasticus xxiv.
